modules.name: Core
modules.description: Backend-agnostic engine foundation — math, ECS, events, assets, profiler, and resource management.

modules.name: Graphics API
modules.description: Low-level SPI that all backends implement — RenderDevice, descriptors, command buffers, and pipeline state.

modules.name: Graphics Common
modules.description: High-level rendering engine — Renderer, ShaderManager, material system, mesh handling, and render graph orchestration.

modules.name: OpenGL Backend
modules.description: OpenGL 4.5 DSA backend — direct state access, bindless resources, and full pipeline implementation.

modules.name: Vulkan Backend
modules.description: Vulkan backend with explicit memory management, command pools, and SPIR-V shader pipeline.

modules.name: WebGPU Backend
modules.description: WebGPU backend for browser and native — WGSL shaders, modern GPU API, runs on desktop and web.

modules.name: Desktop Platform
modules.description: Opinionated desktop assembly — filesystem asset sources, native Slang, LWJGL windowing, JVM deployment.

modules.name: Web Platform
modules.description: Opinionated web assembly — fetch-based asset sources, Slang WASM, TeaVM compilation, browser deployment.

modules.name: Assimp Asset Loader
modules.description: Asset loading via Assimp — imports 40+ 3D model formats (OBJ, FBX, glTF, etc.) through Java FFM bindings.

modules.name: GLFW Windowing
modules.description: GLFW windowing provider via LWJGL — window creation, input handling, and OpenGL/Vulkan context management.

modules.name: LWJGL OpenGL Provider
modules.description: LWJGL bindings for the OpenGL backend — native OpenGL 4.5 access on desktop platforms.

modules.name: LWJGL Vulkan Provider
modules.description: LWJGL bindings for the Vulkan backend — native Vulkan access on desktop platforms.

modules.name: SDL3 Windowing
modules.description: SDL3 windowing provider — cross-platform window creation and input via Java FFM bindings.

modules.name: Slang Shader Compiler
modules.description: Slang shader compilation provider — write shaders once, compile to GLSL, SPIR-V, or WGSL per backend.

modules.name: jWebGPU Provider
modules.description: Native WebGPU bindings for desktop — uses Dawn/wgpu for WebGPU on JVM without a browser.

modules.name: Debug UI
modules.description: Immediate-mode debug UI overlay — windows, widgets, inspectors, and charts. Renders on all backends.

features.name: Valhalla-Ready Math
features.description: Math types are Java records, ready for Project Valhalla value types. Zero-allocation vector math.

features.name: Transaction System
features.description: Atomic resource creation with automatic cleanup on failure. All GPU resource setup goes through transactions.

features.name: Module System
features.description: Dependency-aware module lifecycle with topological ordering, fixed/variable timestep, and state machine transitions.

features.name: Visual Regression Tests
features.description: Screenshot test scenes run on all backends automatically. Cross-backend comparison catches rendering differences.

features.name: Compilable Tutorials
features.description: Tutorials are real Java files that compile against the engine. Auto-generated into website docs — always up to date.

features.name: Entity Components
features.description: Scene entities with typed components — Transform, MeshData, MaterialData. Parent-child hierarchy for scene graph organisation.

features.name: Resource Management
features.description: GpuResourceManager tracks all GPU resources with deferred deletion and leak detection. WeakCache for automatic cleanup.

features.name: PBR Materials
features.description: Physically-based rendering with albedo, roughness, metallic, and per-texture sampler control. Materials are type-safe property maps.

features.name: Render Graph
features.description: Declarative render pass orchestration with automatic resource lifetime management and dependency resolution.

features.name: Desktop + Web
features.description: Same BaseApplication, same scene code — desktop via LWJGL (GLFW + OpenGL/Vulkan), browser via TeaVM + WebGPU.

features.name: Slang Shaders
features.description: Write shaders once in Slang. The engine compiles them to GLSL, SPIR-V, or WGSL depending on the active backend — including in the browser via WASM.

features.name: Debug UI Overlay
features.description: Built-in Nuklear-inspired immediate-mode UI with draggable windows, z-ordering, and input focus. Works on OpenGL, Vulkan, and WebGPU.

features.name: Inspector Panels
features.description: Accordion-style collapsible sections with property grids — label-value pairs, drag-to-edit floats, color pickers, and combo boxes.

features.name: Live Charts
features.description: Ring-buffer line graphs for real-time data — FPS counters, frame time, or any streaming values with auto-range.
